creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't think this patch is needed. I just built xmms on post-objformat
CURRENT amd64, just fine. Its configure script picks up -fPIC, and the
objformat fallout was fixed by rafan three days ago, CVS says.

Close?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

End users have trouble keeping food off their keyboard and sorting messages
in Outlook. Try explaining this problem to them.
